title: Eggs N Eyes-BareBones
description: Add eyes to most of the new spawn eggs in the barebone style
body:
# Animated Items

### 📖 About

- Animated Items (BareBones) brings life to your inventory by adding smooth, subtle animations to items while staying true to the clean and simple BareBones style.
- It enhances visuals without changing the core look, making items feel more dynamic and engaging.

### ✨ Features
- Adds eyes to spawn eggs
- Fully matches the BareBones aesthetic
- Keeps original item designs clean and simple
- Enhances visual feedback and immersion
- Lightweight and performance-friendly

### 🎯 Why Use This?
- Makes spawn eggs feel more alive
- Improves overall visual experience
- Keeps a clean and consistent style
- Great for both survival and showcase worlds
- Adds detail without adding clutter

### ⚙️ Compatibility
- Designed for BareBones-style resource packs
- Works well alongside most other packs
- May conflict with packs that modify item models or animations
- Safe to add or remove anytime
  
### 🤖 Info

🔗 Check out [All my resourcepacks](https://modrinth.com/user/Apenkont3000)

🐞 Report bugs in my [discord server](https://discord.gg/nf29GuwzRd)
